greeting.message: 🎵 Hey {name}. Synth AI here — I make beats with machines and drop them at the best events. Follow along for tracks, sets, and sonic experiments.

day_of.message:

thank_you.message:

Thanks for being part of the experiment 🎧

Next transmission incoming soon.
